title.zh: 鱼叉式钓鱼攻击：邮件网关应用实战
title.en: Harpoon Phishing Attack: Email Gateway Application Practice

description.zh: 详细介绍如何使用 SendCloud 邮件网关实施鱼叉式钓鱼攻击，包括域名配置、API 集成、模板创建以及钓鱼邮件的发送和效果验证。
description.en: Detailed introduction to implementing harpoon phishing attacks using SendCloud email gateway, including domain configuration, API integration, template creation, and phishing email sending and effect verification.

content.zh: 如何使用 SendCloud 发送钓鱼邮件？
content.en: How to use SendCloud to send phishing emails?

annotation.zh: 用户询问 SendCloud 使用方法
annotation.en: User asks about SendCloud usage methods

content.zh: SendCloud 配置流程：1) 注册账号并验证域名 DNS；2) 创建 API_USER 获取 apiuser 和 apikey；3) 创建邮件模板获取 templateInvokeName；4) 参考 SendCloud 文档的 Python 模板发送示例；5) 自定义 fromName、from、subject 等参数。执行 python3 sendcloud_script.py 发送邮件，成功返回包含 emailIdList 的 JSON。
content.en: SendCloud configuration process: 1) Register account and verify domain DNS; 2) Create API_USER to get apiuser and apikey; 3) Create email template to get templateInvokeName; 4) Refer to SendCloud documentation Python template sending example; 5) Customize fromName, from, subject and other parameters. Execute python3 sendcloud_script.py to send email, success returns JSON containing emailIdList.

content.zh: 如何提高钓鱼邮件的欺骗性？
content.en: How to improve the deception of phishing emails?

content.zh: 提高欺骗性技巧：1) 使用 punycode 编码创建视觉相似的域名，如使用特殊字符模拟中国电信域名；2) 邮件内容中使用超链接伪装，如 www.aliyun.com；3) 邮件客户端和移动端显示效果可能不同，需要分别测试；4) 邮件头信息中显示的发件人地址可以通过配置伪装。
content.en: Improve deception techniques: 1) Use punycode encoding to create visually similar domains, such as using special characters to mimic China Telecom domains; 2) Use hyperlink disguise in email content, such as www.aliyun.com; 3) Email client and mobile display effects may differ, need separate testing; 4) Sender address shown in email header can be disguised through configuration.

content.zh: 钓鱼邮件有哪些设计要点？
content.en: What are the design points for phishing emails?

content.zh: 钓鱼邮件设计三要素：1) 标题党：邮件主题需要吸引目标查看；2) 贴合性：邮件内容需要符合目标日常工作习惯，如公司内部通知、业务往来邮件等；3) 紧迫性：邮件需要促使目标尽快点击链接或打开附件，如账户异常提醒、紧急通知等。参考《钓鱼邮件的投递和伪装》获取更多技巧。
content.en: Phishing email design three elements: 1) Headlines: Email subject needs to attract target to view; 2) Relevance: Email content needs to match target's daily work habits, such as internal company notifications, business correspondence; 3) Urgency: Email needs to prompt target to click link or open attachment quickly, such as account anomaly alerts, urgent notifications. Refer to "Phishing Email Delivery and Disguise" for more techniques.
